## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-23-garage-networks/

ls -la task-6.3.*.md
wc -c task-6.3.*.md
TOTAL_MB=$(wc -c task-6.3.*.md | tail -1 | awk '{printf "%.2f", $1/1048576}')
echo "Total : $TOTAL_MB MB"

grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-6.3.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-024 obligatoire toutes
for task in task-6.3.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-024" "$task"; then echo "$task : MISSING decision-024"; fi
done

# Decisions integration obligatoires
grep -qE "decision-022|Sprint 21|MatchingService" task-6.3.6*.md || echo "task-6.3.6 MISSING Sprint 21"
grep -qE "decision-023|Sprint 22|GarageCompensationService" task-6.3.7*.md || echo "task-6.3.7 MISSING Sprint 22"
grep -qE "decision-002|multi-tenant|RLS" task-6.3.2*.md || echo "task-6.3.2 MISSING multi-tenant"

# Pieges minimum 8
for task in task-6.3.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :|piege technique" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then echo "$task : Only $COUNT pieges"; fi
done

# Specific references
grep -qE "garage_networks|network_members|network_contracts" task-6.3.2*.md || echo "task-6.3.2 MISSING entities"
grep -qE "applyForMembership|reviewApplication|leaveNetwork" task-6.3.4*.md || echo "task-6.3.4 MISSING membership"
grep -qE "custom_compensation_rules|compensationRulesSchema|JSONB" task-6.3.5*.md || echo "task-6.3.5 MISSING contracts"
grep -qE "NetworkAwareMatchingService|extends MatchingService" task-6.3.6*.md || echo "task-6.3.6 MISSING extension"
grep -qE "NetworkAwareCompensationService|extends GarageCompensationService" task-6.3.7*.md || echo "task-6.3.7 MISSING extension"
grep -qE "evaluateMember|runQuarterlyEvaluation|tier_auto_upgrade" task-6.3.8*.md || echo "task-6.3.8 MISSING tier"
grep -qE "PHASE 5.*COMPLETE|Phase 5 closure|Sprint 23 closure" task-6.3.12*.md || echo "task-6.3.12 MISSING Phase 5 closure"
```

## CONTRAINTES UNIVERSELLES TOUS LES 12 TASKS

### Style narratif

Dense + professionnel : prose privilegiee, paragraphes 6-12 lignes justifies, niveau technique senior Next.js 15 App Router + React 19 + React Native Expo SDK 50 + Tailwind + Storybook + turbo workspace + multi-app architectures + Sprint 18+19+21+22+23 patterns reuse, terminologie metier consistante (monorepo turbo = workspace patterns multi-app, shared library = @insurtech/ui-shared, design tokens = @insurtech/design-tokens, cross-app SSO = single sign-on multi-apps via shared domain).

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-24-garage-app/

ls -la task-7.1.*.md
wc -c task-7.1.*.md
TOTAL_MB=$(wc -c task-7.1.*.md | tail -1 | awk '{printf "%.2f", $1/1048576}')
echo "Total : $TOTAL_MB MB"

grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-7.1.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-025 obligatoire toutes
for task in task-7.1.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-025" "$task"; then echo "$task : MISSING decision-025"; fi
done

# Decisions integration obligatoires
grep -qE "decision-019|Sprint 18" task-7.1.5*.md || echo "task-7.1.5 MISSING Sprint 18"
grep -qE "decision-020|Sprint 19" task-7.1.6*.md || echo "task-7.1.6 MISSING Sprint 19"

# Pieges minimum 8
for task in task-7.1.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :|piege technique" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then echo "$task : Only $COUNT pieges"; fi
done

# Specific references

grep -qE "design-tokens|@insurtech/design-tokens" task-7.1.4*.md || echo "task-7.1.4 MISSING design-tokens"

grep -qE "Sprint 25|Sprint 24 closure|multi-actor" task-7.1.12*.md || echo "task-7.1.12 MISSING closure"

### Task 7.2.2 -- Framework + Decorator + Guard

**160-210 KB | P0 CRITIQUE | 8h** | Dependances : 7.2.1

**Scope** : Package framework + entites + decorator + guard + ESLint rule + audit integration.

**Livrables** : Package `@insurtech/cross-tenant-framework` v1.0.0, entites domain :
- `CrossTenantOperation` (id + operation_type + initiator_user_id + initiator_tenant_id + target_tenant_ids[] + scope_data_fields[] + reason + approval_required + approved_by_user_id nullable + approved_at nullable + executed_at nullable + audit_trail JSONB + created_at)
- `CrossTenantPolicy` (id + operation_type + roles_allowed[] + tenant_scope enum all/specific/anonymized + approval_required + max_records_per_query + audit_retention_years + active)
- `AnonymizationRule` (id + entity_type + field_name + strategy enum + parameters JSONB + epsilon_dp NUMERIC nullable + active)

Migrations + RLS adapted (super_admin bypass via dedicated SQL functions audited), enums TypeScript, decorator `@CrossTenant(operation_type, options?)` NestJS SetMetadata, guard `CrossTenantGuard implements CanActivate` :
1. Extract metadata from handler
2. Verify request.user.role in policy.roles_allowed
3. If approval_required verify approved CrossTenantOperation exists
4. Apply max_records limit query parameters
5. Audit Sprint 7 dedicated category `cross_tenant_operations`
6. Throw ForbiddenException si check fails + reason explanatory

ESLint custom rule `no-direct-db-without-tenant` AST analysis (detect `.where(...)` without tenant_id condition outside @CrossTenant scope), 16+ tests scenarios authorized + denied + audit.

**Pieges 10** :
- Decorator metadata reflection NestJS Reflector
- Guard execution order before other guards
- RLS bypass super_admin SQL functions secure
- ESLint AST analysis complex query patterns
- Approval workflow async vs sync
- Max records enforcement query parameters
- Audit Sprint 7 category dedicated indexing
- Tenant_id propagation AsyncLocalStorage Sprint 6
- Permission cache invalidation
- Error messages explanatory without leaking

### Task 7.2.5 -- Anonymization Framework

**130-170 KB | P0 CRITIQUE PRIVACY | 6h** | Dependances : 7.2.4

**Scope** : Service anonymization 5 strategies + k-anonymity + epsilon-DP + validation rules schema.

**Livrables** : Service `AnonymizationService` :
- `applyRules(data: any[], ruleset: AnonymizationRule[]): any[]` apply rules per field
- Strategies :
  - `nullify` set to null (identifiants strict)
  - `hash` SHA-256 (IDs traceable but anonymized + salted)
  - `mask` partial (phone `06**89**12` + email `a***@b.com` + name `J*** D***`)
  - `aggregate` bucket (ages 18-25/26-35/36-50/50+ + regions province aggregated + revenues S/M/L brackets)
  - `differential_privacy` add Laplacian noise epsilon-DP for sensitive numerics (montant_mad + ratings + counts)
- Validation rules schema Zod strict (entity_type + field_name + strategy + parameters + epsilon optional)
- Helper `verifyKAnonymity(data: any[], quasi_identifiers: string[]): boolean` minimum 100 records par bucket (k>=100)
- Helper `addLaplacianNoise(value, sensitivity, epsilon)` differential privacy
- Audit Sprint 7

12+ tests scenarios (all 5 strategies + edge cases + k-anonymity verification + epsilon-DP).

**Pieges 8** :
- SHA-256 hashing salt rotation strategy
- Mask partial different field types
- Aggregate buckets distribution skew
- Differential privacy epsilon tuning sensitive
- k-anonymity quasi-identifiers selection
- Validation rules JSONB schema evolution
- Hash collision risk small dataset
- Audit volume rules applications

### Task 7.2.8 -- Cross-Tenant Search Marketplace

**100-130 KB | P0 | 4h** | Dependances : 7.2.7

**Scope** : Search garages cross-network with visibility rules strict.

**Livrables** : Service `CrossTenantSearchService.searchGarages(customer_id, query, location, filters?)` :
1. Lookup customer.tenant_id
2. Query open marketplace garages always visible (status='active' + verified=true)
3. Query network member garages : visible only same-tenant customer (via NetworkMember.tenant_id = customer.tenant_id)
4. RLS adapted via dedicated SQL function `search_garages_cross_tenant(customer_tenant_id, query, location)`
5. Return GaragesSearchResult[] with `visibility_reason: 'open_marketplace'|'same_tenant_network_member'`
6. Audit search queries Sprint 7

Endpoint `GET /api/v1/garages/search?query&lat&lng&radius` permissions customer + audit, 8+ tests scenarios (visibility rules + same-tenant + cross-tenant invisible + audit).

## CONTRAINTES UNIVERSELLES TOUS LES 12 TASKS

### Format strict

Headers ATX, code blocks tag (bash/typescript/sql/yaml/json), tableaux pipes alignes, diagrams Mermaid.

### Style narratif

Dense + professionnel : prose privilegiee, paragraphes 6-12 lignes justifies, niveau technique senior NestJS decorators + guards + multi-tenant SaaS + privacy engineering + differential privacy + ACAPS compliance + Sprint 5+7 RBAC reinforced + audit retention legal, terminologie metier consistante (cross-tenant = multi-tenant operations legitimate + audited, super-admin = Skalean staff dedicated roles, anonymization = privacy-preserving data sharing, ACAPS = Marocan insurance regulator, k-anonymity = privacy metric, differential privacy = mathematical privacy guarantee).

### References strategiques obligatoires

Chaque task minimum 5 decisions (001-026), **decision-026 obligatoire toutes tasks 7.2.X**, **decisions 002+007 obligatoires** tasks integration multi-tenant + RBAC.

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-25-cross-tenant/

ls -la task-7.2.*.md
wc -c task-7.2.*.md
TOTAL_MB=$(wc -c task-7.2.*.md | tail -1 | awk '{printf "%.2f", $1/1048576}')
echo "Total : $TOTAL_MB MB"

grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-7.2.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-026 obligatoire toutes
for task in task-7.2.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-026" "$task"; then echo "$task : MISSING decision-026"; fi
done

# Decisions integration obligatoires
grep -qE "decision-002|multi-tenant" task-7.2.2*.md || echo "task-7.2.2 MISSING multi-tenant"
grep -qE "decision-007|Sprint 5|Sprint 7" task-7.2.3*.md || echo "task-7.2.3 MISSING auth+audit"

# Pieges minimum 8
for task in task-7.2.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :|piege technique" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then echo "$task : Only $COUNT pieges"; fi
done

# Specific references
grep -qE "@CrossTenant|CrossTenantGuard" task-7.2.2*.md || echo "task-7.2.2 MISSING framework"
grep -qE "TOTP|2FA|otplib" task-7.2.3*.md || echo "task-7.2.3 MISSING 2FA"
grep -qE "nullify|hash|mask|aggregate|differential_privacy" task-7.2.5*.md || echo "task-7.2.5 MISSING strategies"
grep -qE "ACAPS|monthly.*cron|XLSX|PDF" task-7.2.7*.md || echo "task-7.2.7 MISSING ACAPS"
grep -qE "cross_tenant_operations|7.*years" task-7.2.9*.md || echo "task-7.2.9 MISSING audit"
grep -qE "Sprint 25 closure|ACAPS-grade" task-7.2.12*.md || echo "task-7.2.12 MISSING closure"
```

6. Lire decisions 023+024+025+026 si task integration
7. Template 03 -- 11 sections strict
8. Rediger task-7.3.{Z}-{slug}.md
9. Verifier taille fourchette
10. Verifier no emoji
11. Commit Conventional Commits
```

### Sequencement critique

- 7.3.1 peer-reviewed
- 7.3.2 + 7.3.3 apps foundation parallel allowed mais sequencement 7.3.4 SSO consume both
- 7.3.7 reviewer migration CRITIQUE zero downtime
- 7.3.12 closure multi-actor proof point Demo Day

# G-27 -- META-PROMPT GENERATEUR DE TASKS -- SPRINT 27

## POUR CLAUDE CODE

Generer **12 fichiers task-7.4.{Z}-prompt.md** dans `00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-27-tenants-management/`. Auto-suffisants 100-350 KB, template `03-template-task.md` strict.

Sprint 27 = **tenants lifecycle complete commercial enablement B2B + KYC ACAPS-grade**.

## REGLES D'EXECUTION

### Sequencement 7.4.1 -> 7.4.12 strict.

### Lectures obligatoires AVANT

1. **B-27 + C-27 + V-27**
2. **decisions/001-028** -- decision-028 obligatoire toutes, decisions 002 (multi-tenant) + 025 (multi-app) + 026 (cross-tenant) + 027 (admin foundation 2FA) obligatoires
3. **templates/03-template-task.md**
4. **ACAPS license format docs** + **KYC best practices** + **Stripe billing patterns (foundation only)** + **Sprint 10 S3 storage docs** + **Sprint 25 anonymization docs**

### Coherence sprints 1-26 implementes

Reuse Sprint 5 auth + Sprint 6 multi-tenant + Sprint 7 audit + Sprint 9 notifications + Sprint 10 S3 storage + Sprint 23 networks + Sprint 25 cross-tenant anonymization + Sprint 26 admin-portal + 2FA.

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections

REFERENCES (ACAPS format + KYC + Stripe foundation + Sprint 10 S3 + Sprint 25 anonymization + Sprint 26 admin-portal) / 8. IMPLEMENTATION 50-70% / 9. TESTS 12+ unit + 5+ integration + 3+ E2E / 10. CRITERES VALIDATION / 11. COMMANDES + NOTES

## TASKS A GENERER -- SCOPES CONDENSED

### Task 7.4.1 -- Architecture + Decision-028

**110-150 KB | P0 | 5h** | Sprint 26 closure

**Scope** : Decision-028 ratifiee + design doc 20+ pages + peer-review + kickoff Phase 6 Sprint 4.

**Livrables** : `decisions/028-tenants-lifecycle-management.md` 8-12 pages (date 12 juin 2026 + contexte commercial enablement B2B + decision tenants lifecycle complete + KYC ACAPS-grade + configuration overrides + branding optional + suspension safeguards + deletion cascade + billing foundation + alternatives evaluees manual onboarding / self-service + consequences + roadmap Phase 7+ Stripe billing + automated KYC verification gov databases + tenant impersonation by super-admin), design doc 20+ pages, peer-review.

**Pieges 8** :
- Commercial vs technical scope creep
- KYC ACAPS regulatory ambiguity
- Suspension impact in-flight operations
- Deletion legal retention 7 years
- Configuration overrides complexity
- Branding default fallback consistency
- Billing foundation premature optimization Phase 7+
- Tenant impersonation alternative Sprint 25 framework

### Task 7.4.2 -- Entites Tenants

**140-180 KB | P0 CRITIQUE | 7h** | Dependances : 7.4.1

**Scope** : 5 entites domain + migrations + RLS strict + indexes performance + seeds.

**Livrables** : Package `@insurtech/tenants-management` v1.0.0, entites :
- `tenants` etendue (id + name + legal_name + registration_number UNIQUE + status enum active/pending_kyc/suspended/deleted_soft + tier enum basic/standard/premium + created_at + activated_at + suspended_at + deletion_scheduled_at + super_admin_owner_id + acaps_license_number nullable + compliance_status enum pending/verified/expired + audit_trail JSONB)
- `tenant_configurations` (id + tenant_id + key + value JSONB + category + override_default boolean + audit_trail)
- `tenant_brandings` (id + tenant_id + logo_url + primary_color + secondary_color + font_family + email_signature + active boolean)
- `tenant_billings` (id + tenant_id + plan_id + billing_cycle monthly/yearly + payment_method + last_invoice_at + next_invoice_at + status active/past_due/suspended)
- `tenant_kyc_documents` (id + tenant_id + document_type enum RC/IF/ICE/acaps_license/bank_certificate + url S3 + uploaded_at + verified_by_user_id nullable + verified_at nullable + status pending/verified/rejected + rejection_reason)

Migrations + RLS strict tenant_id + indexes (status partial + tier + compliance_status + UNIQUE registration_number + UNIQUE (tenant_id, key) configurations + UNIQUE (tenant_id, document_type) kyc), enums TypeScript, seeds 3 fictional tenants demo, 16+ tests unitaires.

**Pieges 10** :
- RLS strict tenant_id propagation Sprint 6
- UNIQUE registration_number violations 409 Conflict
- ACAPS license format regex strict
- Status transitions validated (pending_kyc -> active require KYC verified)
- Compliance_status separate from status
- Soft-delete via status='deleted_soft' not column
- KYC documents UNIQUE per type per tenant
- Configuration UNIQUE per key per tenant
- Branding active boolean single per tenant
- Billing plan_id FK to plans table

### Task 7.4.3 -- Tenant Creation

**130-170 KB | P0 | 6h** | Dependances : 7.4.2

**Scope** : Service creation + onboarding + initial admin user + invitation.

**Livrables** : Service `TenantCreationService.createTenant(tenant_data, super_admin_id)` (validate unique registration_number 409 if exists + ACAPS license format regex `^[A-Z]{2}\d{6}$` configurable env + create Tenant status='pending_kyc' + create initial admin user role='insurer_admin' Sprint 5 + send invitation email Sprint 9 with onboarding link + audit Sprint 7 + emit `tenant.created` Kafka), 12+ tests scenarios.

**Pieges 8** :
- Uniqueness validation race conditions
- ACAPS regex validation tests positive + negative
- Initial admin user creation transactional
- Invitation email Sprint 9 template branded
- Audit super_admin actor
- Emit Avro schema Sprint 14
- Rollback if creation fails partial
- Tenant_id propagation new tenant context

### Task 7.4.4 -- KYC Verification

**140-180 KB | P0 CRITIQUE COMPLIANCE | 7h** | Dependances : 7.4.3

**Scope** : Service KYC workflow + upload S3 + verification + status transitions + ACAPS-grade traceability.

**Livrables** : Service `TenantKycService` :
- `uploadDocument(tenant_id, document_type, file)` Sprint 10 S3 upload encrypted + create TenantKycDocument status='pending' + audit + emit
- `verifyDocument(document_id, verifier_id, decision, rejection_reason?)` super_admin OR compliance_officer + audit + emit `tenant.kyc_document_verified` ou `tenant.kyc_document_rejected`
- `getKycStatus(tenant_id)` aggregate verification states (5 documents required : RC + IF + ICE + acaps_license + bank_certificate via TENANT_KYC_REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS env)
- Transition tenant.compliance_status = 'verified' if all 5 documents status='verified'
- Transition tenant.status = 'active' from 'pending_kyc' if compliance_status='verified' + tenant.activated_at = now()
- Notifications Sprint 9 (insurer_admin "Document KYC verifie/rejete" + super_admin "Tenant pret pour activation")

14+ tests scenarios.

**Pieges 10** :
- S3 Sprint 10 encryption + access logged
- Documents access strict (super_admin + compliance_officer only)
- Status transitions atomic
- Audit super_admin verifier_id + decision + rationale
- Notifications multi-recipient
- Rejection reason mandatory if rejected
- Re-upload after rejection allowed
- KYC documents PII privacy 7 years retention
- ACAPS license validation format strict
- Bank certificate verification real-world (manual review documented Phase 7+ automation)

### Task 7.4.5 -- Configuration Overrides

**130-170 KB | P0 | 6h** | Dependances : 7.4.4

**Scope** : Service configuration custom overrides per tenant + categories + JSONB Zod + audit.

**Livrables** : Service `TenantConfigurationService` :
- `setConfiguration(tenant_id, key, value, category)` super_admin only + JSONB Zod validation strict + audit + emit
- `getConfiguration(tenant_id, key)` lookup with fallback default value
- `listConfigurations(tenant_id, category?)` browse + filters
- `deleteConfiguration(tenant_id, key)` super_admin + audit

Categories defined :
- `matching_rules` (Sprint 21 dispatch overrides + Sprint 23 networks priority weight)
- `compensation_defaults` (Sprint 22 garage compensation tiered + Sprint 23 contracts override)
- `notification_templates` (Sprint 9 templates branded)
- `workflow_timeouts` (Sprint 21 offer timeout 60s + Sprint 22 dispute SLA hours)
- `ai_thresholds` (Sprint 20 IA estimation confidence thresholds + auto-approve)

JSONB Zod schemas per category, priority order documented (Configuration > Network Contract Sprint 23 > Tenant default > Global default), audit Sprint 7, 12+ tests scenarios.

**Pieges 8** :
- JSONB Zod schemas evolution per category
- Priority chain documented + tests
- Fallback lookup performance cache 5min TTL
- Audit changes diff old vs new
- Cross-tenant access strict
- Category enum extensibility
- Override_default boolean meaning
- Configuration deletion impact

### Task 7.4.6 -- Tenant Branding

**110-150 KB | P0 | 5h** | Dependances : 7.4.5

**Scope** : Service branding optional + CSS variables override + default fallback.

**Livrables** : Service `TenantBrandingService` :
- `setBranding(tenant_id, branding_data)` (logo S3 upload + primary_color + secondary_color + font_family + email_signature)
- `activateBranding(tenant_id)` set active=true
- `deactivateBranding(tenant_id)` set active=false fallback default Skalean
- `getBranding(tenant_id): TenantBranding | null` lookup
- `applyBrandingToResponse(tenant_id, response_html)` inject CSS variables override design-tokens Sprint 24

Default Skalean branding fallback always available if not set OR not active, email templates Sprint 9 branded per-tenant (logo + colors + signature), CSS variables dynamic injection (`--color-primary: ${branding.primary_color}` override `@insurtech/design-tokens` defaults), 10+ tests scenarios.

**Pieges 8** :
- Logo S3 size limits + formats
- Color picker validation hex
- Font family availability
- Email signature HTML sanitization
- CSS variables injection security XSS
- Default fallback consistency
- Active toggle immediate effect
- Cross-app branding propagation

### Task 7.4.7 -- Tenant Suspension

**130-170 KB | P0 CRITIQUE SAFEGUARDS | 6h** | Dependances : 7.4.6

**Scope** : Service suspension + safeguards verify active sinistres + grace period + notifications + reversible.

**Livrables** : Service `TenantSuspensionService` :
- `suspendTenant(tenant_id, reason, super_admin_id)` :
  - Verify no active sinistres (sinistre.status IN ['received', 'review', 'dispatch_pending', 'in_progress']) within tenant_id scope → block if count > 0 + return list active sinistres
  - Grace period TENANT_SUSPENSION_GRACE_DAYS=30 for pending operations
  - Update tenant.status='suspended' + tenant.suspended_at = now() + reason audit
  - Notify all tenant users Sprint 9 "Tenant suspended -- complete pending operations within 30 days"
  - Block access (login redirect to suspension page + API returns 403 SuspendedTenant)
  - Emit `tenant.suspended`
- `reactivateTenant(tenant_id, super_admin_id)` reversible status='active' + audit + emit + notify
- `getSuspensionImpact(tenant_id)` preview what would be affected (count active sinistres + users + networks)

12+ tests scenarios.

**Pieges 10** :
- Active sinistres status enum complete list
- Block 409 Conflict if active > 0 + return details
- Grace period grace_period_at field tracking
- Notifications all tenant users (insurer_admin + insurer staff)
- API access middleware 403 SuspendedTenant
- Login redirect suspension page
- Reversible vs deletion clear distinction
- Audit super_admin reason mandatory
- Emit events for downstream services
- Suspension impact preview UI Sprint 26

### Task 7.4.8 -- Tenant Deletion Cascade

**140-180 KB | P0 CRITIQUE COMPLIANCE | 7h** | Dependances : 7.4.7

**Scope** : Service deletion soft + cascade rules + anonymization PII Sprint 25 + audit irreversible.

**Livrables** : Service `TenantDeletionService` :
- `requestDeletion(tenant_id, super_admin_id, reason)` generate confirm_token single-use TTL TENANT_DELETION_CONFIRM_TOKEN_TTL_MINUTES=5 + send to super_admin email + audit
- `deleteTenant(tenant_id, super_admin_id, confirm_token)` :
  - Verify confirm_token valid + single-use + not expired
  - Status='deleted_soft' + deletion_scheduled_at = now() + audit reinforced Sprint 25 + emit `tenant.deleted_soft`
  - Anonymize PII Sprint 25 `AnonymizationService.applyRules`:
    - Customers phones → mask `06**89**12`
    - Customers emails → mask `c***@b.com`
    - Customers names → mask `J*** D***`
    - Garage owners names + emails + phones
    - User accounts → email hashed
  - Cascade soft-delete :
    - Users tenant_id (insurer_admin + insurer staff + customers attached)
    - Networks Sprint 23 (NetworkManagementService.suspendNetwork all)
    - NetworkMemberships
    - NetworkContracts
    - TenantConfigurations preserved (for audit)
    - TenantBrandings preserved (for audit)
    - TenantBillings (no auto-delete billing records 7 years legal)
    - TenantKycDocuments preserved (compliance)
  - Retain data 7 years TENANT_DELETION_RETENTION_YEARS legal compliance
  - Audit Sprint 7 reinforced category + 7+ years Sprint 25
  - Notify ACAPS compliance contact (Phase 7+ automated, Sprint 27 manual)

12+ tests scenarios + confirmation flow + cascade verification.

**Pieges 10** :
- Confirm token single-use atomic (Redis lock)
- Soft-delete not hard-delete strict
- Anonymization order strict (PII before cascade)
- Cascade Networks Sprint 23 + memberships
- Billing records 7 years retention
- KYC documents preserved compliance
- Audit reinforced 7+ years
- Emit downstream services cleanup
- Reversal impossible documented
- ACAPS notification Phase 7+

### Task 7.4.9 -- Tenant Billing Foundation

**110-150 KB | P0 | 5h** | Dependances : 7.4.8

**Scope** : Service billing foundation + plans + invoice generation foundation + status (no payment processing Sprint 27).

**Livrables** : Service `TenantBillingService` foundation :
- `createBilling(tenant_id, plan_id, billing_cycle)` create TenantBilling
- `setPlan(tenant_id, plan_id)` update plan + audit
- `generateInvoice(tenant_id, period)` foundation only NO payment processing (returns invoice metadata + amount calculation based plan + usage placeholder)
- `recordPayment(tenant_id, amount, reference)` manual payment recording super_admin (Phase 7+ Stripe webhook automatic)
- `updateStatus(tenant_id, status)` active/past_due/suspended
- Seeds plans defaults :
  - `basic` (50 EUR/mois + max 100 sinistres/mois + 1 network)
  - `standard` (150 EUR/mois + max 500 sinistres + 3 networks)
  - `premium` (500 EUR/mois + unlimited + unlimited networks + branding included)

Foundation only no Stripe integration (defers Phase 7+), 10+ tests scenarios.

**Pieges 8** :
- Plans configuration vs hardcoded
- Invoice generation idempotency
- Payment recording manual audit
- Status transitions documented
- Billing cycle yearly vs monthly
- Past_due grace period before suspension
- Currency MAD vs EUR display
- Foundation explicit no payment processing

### Task 7.4.10 -- Admin Portal Tenants UI

**150-200 KB | P0 | 8h** | Dependances : 7.4.9

**Scope** : Screens admin-portal Sprint 26 `/admin/tenants/*` complete UI super-admin operations.

**Livrables** : Screens admin-portal :
- List `/admin/tenants` (cards + filters status/tier + sort + search by name/registration_number + pagination)
- Create wizard `/admin/tenants/create` 4 steps :
  - Step 1 : Legal info (name + legal_name + registration_number + acaps_license_number + tier)
  - Step 2 : Initial admin user (name + email + phone)
  - Step 3 : Initial KYC documents upload optional (skip if not ready)
  - Step 4 : Confirmation + create

  - Overview (KPIs tenant + status badges + activation timeline)
  - KYC Documents (5 documents grid + verify/reject UI + history)
  - Configuration (overrides JSONB editor per category + diff vs defaults)
  - Branding (logo upload + color picker preview + email signature editor)
  - Users (list tenant users + roles)
  - Sinistres summary (counts by status + total amount)
  - Billing (current plan + invoices history + manual payment recording)
  - Audit (tenant-specific audit logs Sprint 7)
- Suspension confirm modal (display impact preview + reason mandatory + confirm)
- Deletion confirm wizard 3 steps (Warning → Reason → Confirm token via email)

14+ tests E2E.

**Pieges 8** :
- Wizard state management multi-step React Query
- JSONB editor (visual builder OR JSON editor)
- Color picker hex validation
- Logo upload preview Sprint 10
- Diff vs defaults visualization
- Audit logs pagination performance
- Suspension impact preview before
- Deletion 3-step confirmation token via email

**100-130 KB | P0 | 4h** | Dependances : 7.4.10

## CONTRAINTES UNIVERSELLES TOUS LES 12 TASKS

### Format strict

Headers ATX, code blocks (bash/typescript/sql/yaml/json), tableaux, Mermaid diagrams.

### Style narratif

Dense + professionnel : prose privilegiee, paragraphes 6-12 lignes justifies, niveau technique senior NestJS + multi-tenant SaaS + KYC workflows + ACAPS compliance + billing patterns + Sprint 5+7+9+10+25+26 integration.

Chaque task minimum 5 decisions, **decision-028 obligatoire toutes tasks 7.4.X**, **decisions 002+025+026+027 obligatoires** tasks integration.

```md
# G-28 -- META-PROMPT GENERATEUR DE TASKS -- SPRINT 28

**Version** : v3.0

### Task 7.5.4 -- Execution + Performance (150-200 KB | 8h) | Deps : 7.5.3

- Sprint 13 ClickHouse aggregations + Postgres
- Sprint 25 anonymization cross-tenant via `@CrossTenant`
- Materialized views reuse

- Caching results Redis 1h TTL per (report_id + parameters_hash)
- Async queue Sprint 14 BullMQ if execution > 30s estimated
- Audit Sprint 7

### Task 7.5.5 -- Scheduling Cron (130-170 KB | 6h) | Deps : 7.5.4

- Sprint 7 audit

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-28-admin-reports/
ls -la task-7.5.*.md
wc -c task-7.5.*.md

grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-7.5.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-029 obligatoire
for task in task-7.5.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-029" "$task"; then echo "$task : MISSING decision-029"; fi
done

# Integration decisions
grep -qE "decision-026|Sprint 25|cross-tenant" task-7.5.4*.md || echo "task-7.5.4 MISSING Sprint 25"
grep -qE "decision-027|Sprint 26|2FA" task-7.5.8*.md || echo "task-7.5.8 MISSING 2FA"
grep -qE "decision-028|Sprint 27|branding" task-7.5.6*.md || echo "task-7.5.6 MISSING Sprint 27"

# Specific
grep -qE "ClickHouse|Sprint 13|materialized" task-7.5.4*.md || echo "task-7.5.4 MISSING ClickHouse"
grep -qE "whitelist|sandbox|no.*DELETE" task-7.5.7*.md || echo "task-7.5.7 MISSING SQL safe"
grep -qE "PHASE 6.*COMPLETE|Phase 6 closure" task-7.5.12*.md || echo "task-7.5.12 MISSING Phase 6 closure"

# Pieges min 8
for task in task-7.5.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then echo "$task : Only $COUNT pieges"; fi
done
```

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections par task

Chaque fichier task-8.1.{Z}-prompt.md doit avoir :

1. **TITRE** : `# Task 8.1.{Z} -- {Nom de la tache}`
2. **METADONNEES** : phase + sprint + priorite + effort + dependances + decisions referenecees (decisions 011 + 025 + 030 obligatoires + autres relevantes) + livrables principaux + criteres validation references V-29
3. **BUT** : 2-3 paragraphes denses expliquant ce que la tache realise + impact strategique pivot 2-sided platform
4. **CONTEXTE** : 3-5 paragraphes + **minimum 8 pieges techniques** identifies avec solutions
5. **OBJECTIF** : liste 12+ items concrets a livrer
6. **ETAT REPO** : fichiers existants + a creer + a modifier
7. **REFERENCES** : Sprint 11 docs + Sprint 13 docs + Sprint 18 docs + Sprint 24 docs + Schema.org docs + decision-030 + autres relevantes
8. **IMPLEMENTATION** : 50-70% du fichier en code TypeScript NestJS + tests + migrations + UI Next.js
9. **TESTS** : minimum 12 unit + 5 integration + 3 E2E avec assertions explicites
10. **CRITERES VALIDATION** : referenecees V-29 criteres T0X-VY specifiques
11. **COMMANDES + NOTES** : commands d'execution + edge cases + pitfalls

## TASKS A GENERER -- SCOPES DETAILLES

### Task 8.1.1 -- Architecture + Decision-030 + Design Doc

**110-150 KB | P0 | 5h** | Dependances : Sprint 28 closure Phase 6 complete

**Scope** :
- Decision-030 ratifiee `decisions/030-garage-vertical-direct-customer.md` 8-12 pages :
  - Date : 14 juin 2026
  - Contexte : garage business beyond insurance (30% revenue direct customers actuellement via tools tiers Google My Business + Facebook + WhatsApp + paper)
  - Decision : garage vertical direct customer business model + 2-sided platform commercial expansion
  - Architecture : 5 entites + 5 services + Sprint 11 reuse + Sprint 18+24 extensions
  - Alternatives evaluees : insurance-only status quo (limited TAM Morocco 500M), outsourcing booking tools tiers Booking.com Yokoy (data not owned Skalean), minimal viable booking only (insufficient foundation Sprint 30-33), comprehensive foundation (choisi)
  - Consequences : developpement effort 80h + maintenance + complexite UX 5 nouveaux tabs garage-portal + 7 nouveaux routes customer-portal
  - Roadmap Phase 7+ : Sprint 30 operations + Sprint 31 accounting + Sprint 31 marketing + Sprint 32 loyalty + Sprint 33 AI optimization
  - Roadmap Phase 8+ : white-label garage app + native mobile app + marketplace cross-sell + multi-language FR/AR/EN + video tours virtual showrooms + AR/VR profile experiences
- Design doc `docs/architecture/garage-vertical-design.md` 20+ pages (1000+ lignes minimum) :
  - 5 entites detaillees JSONB schemas Zod (opening_hours weekly + photos_urls + audit_trail)
  - Diagrammes Mermaid event flows (direct booking workflow Sprint 11 preAuthorize -> confirmed -> in_progress -> completed Sprint 11 capture OR cancelled Sprint 11 refund)
  - Sprint 11 PayoutInstantService adapter direct customer -> garage flow
  - Public profile SEO architecture (slug uniqueness + Schema.org LocalBusiness JSON-LD + sitemap dynamic + robots.txt)
  - Reviews authenticity enforce (verified_purchase + window submission + moderation)
  - Sprint 13 analytics vertical split materialized views
- Peer-review minutes Saad CTO + Abla CEO
- Kickoff Phase 7 Sprint 1 alignement

**Pieges 8** :
1. Commercial scope creep (foundation only Sprint 29, advanced Sprint 30-33 + Phase 8+)
2. Insurance vs direct customer data model confusion (DirectCustomer DISTINCT Sprint 16 Customer)
3. Sprint 11 payment direction insurer->garage vs customer->garage (adapter pattern)
4. SEO indexing risk bad content (robots.txt + verified_badge + moderation)
5. Reviews fake reviews (verified_purchase strict + window submission)
6. Cross-data leak RLS (entity_type strict)
7. Garage portal UX cluttered (separation Direct vs Insurance)
8. Cash_on_delivery accounting complications (audit separately + Sprint 31 reconciliation)

### Task 8.1.2 -- Entites Garage Vertical (5 tables)

**140-180 KB | P0 CRITIQUE | 7h** | Dependances : 8.1.1

- 5 migrations TypeORM/Knex :
  - `garage_services` (id UUID + garage_id UUID FK + name VARCHAR + description TEXT + category enum + price_base_mad NUMERIC(10,2) + price_variable BOOLEAN + duration_estimated_minutes INTEGER + active BOOLEAN + photos_urls TEXT[] + created_at + audit_trail JSONB) + RLS garage_id + indexes (garage_id + category + active partial + price_base_mad) + UNIQUE (garage_id, name)
  - `direct_bookings` (id + garage_id FK + customer_id FK + service_id FK + scheduled_at TIMESTAMP + status enum + amount_quoted_mad + amount_final_mad nullable + payment_method enum + payment_status enum + payment_reference nullable + customer_notes TEXT + garage_notes TEXT nullable + opened_at + completed_at + cancelled_at + cancellation_reason + audit_trail) + RLS + indexes (garage_id + customer_id + status partial + scheduled_at + payment_status partial)
  - `direct_customers` (id + garage_id FK + name + phone VARCHAR + email VARCHAR nullable + city + first_booking_at + total_bookings INTEGER + total_spent_mad NUMERIC(10,2) + last_booking_at + segment computed GENERATED + opt_in_marketing BOOLEAN + audit_trail) + RLS + indexes (garage_id + last_booking_at + opt_in_marketing + segment partial) + UNIQUE (garage_id, phone)
  - `garage_public_profiles` (garage_id UUID PK + slug_seo VARCHAR + about_text TEXT + photos_gallery TEXT[] + opening_hours JSONB + services_displayed UUID[] + verified_badge BOOLEAN + rating_average NUMERIC(3,2) + reviews_count INTEGER + active BOOLEAN + audit_trail) + RLS special (active=true public_read) + UNIQUE slug_seo global + indexes (active partial + verified_badge partial + slug_seo)
  - `direct_reviews` (id + booking_id FK + customer_id FK + garage_id FK + rating INTEGER CHECK 1-5 + comment TEXT nullable + photos TEXT[] + verified_purchase BOOLEAN true + active BOOLEAN + moderation_reason TEXT nullable + submitted_at + audit_trail) + RLS + UNIQUE booking_id + indexes (garage_id + customer_id + rating + active partial + submitted_at)
- Enable RLS toutes 5 tables + CREATE POLICY garage_id = current_tenant_garage_id + special policy GaragePublicProfile public_read where active=true (no auth)

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION DES 12 FICHIERS

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-29-garage-vertical/

# Lister + tailles
ls -la task-8.1.*.md
wc -c task-8.1.*.md

# No emoji
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-8.1.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-030 obligatoire
for task in task-8.1.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-030" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-030"
  fi
done

# Decisions integration
grep -qE "decision-011|Sprint 11|PayoutInstantService" task-8.1.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.1.4 MISSING Sprint 11"
grep -qE "Schema\.org|LocalBusiness|JSON-LD" task-8.1.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.1.6 MISSING Schema.org"
grep -qE "verified_purchase|booking.*completed" task-8.1.7*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.1.7 MISSING verified"
grep -qE "Sprint 24|garage-portal" task-8.1.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.1.8 MISSING Sprint 24"
grep -qE "Sprint 18|customer-portal" task-8.1.9*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.1.9 MISSING Sprint 18"
grep -qE "Sprint 29 closure|commercial differentiation|2-sided platform|GO Sprint 30" task-8.1.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.1.12 MISSING closure"

# Pieges >= 8
for task in task-8.1.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges"
  fi
done
```

Generer **12 fichiers task-8.2.{Z}-prompt.md** dans `00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-30-garage-internal/`. Chaque fichier doit etre auto-suffisant 100-350 KB, suivre template `templates/03-template-task.md` strict.

Sprint 30 = **garage internal operations management** + **Sprint 22+29 event handlers critique** + **foundation Sprint 31 accounting**.

## REGLES D'EXECUTION

### Sequencement 8.2.1 -> 8.2.12 strict.

1. **B-30 + C-30 + V-30** Sprint 30 specifications complete
2. **decisions/001-031** -- decision-031 obligatoire toutes tasks, decisions 022 (Sprint 22 sinistre integration) + 025 (multi-app) + 030 (Sprint 29 direct booking integration) obligatoires
3. **templates/03-template-task.md** structure 11 sections strict
4. **Documentation Sprint 22 sinistre work_submission events** (event publisher Sprint 22.6 fires apres save commit)
5. **Documentation Sprint 29 direct booking confirmed events** (event publisher Sprint 29.4 fires apres pre-authorization)
6. **Documentation Sprint 13 ClickHouse materialized views patterns** Sprint 13.5+
7. **Documentation Sprint 24 garage-portal architecture multi-app shared UI** Sprint 24.3+
8. **Documentation Sprint 7.5a permissions granular** + **Sprint 9 notifications** + **Sprint 10 S3 storage** + **Sprint 14 events Avro** + **Sprint 15 idempotency**

Reuse Sprint 5 auth (insurer_admin + garage_owner + garage_manager roles) + Sprint 6 multi-tenant + Sprint 7 audit comprehensive + Sprint 7.5a permissions + Sprint 9 notifications email + push + Sprint 10 S3 photos encrypted + Sprint 13 ClickHouse materialized views refresh + Sprint 14 events Avro Kafka + Sprint 15 idempotency Redis + Sprint 22 sinistre work_submission + Sprint 24 garage-portal Next.js routes + Sprint 29 direct booking workflow.

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections par task

Chaque fichier task-8.2.{Z}-prompt.md doit avoir :

1. **TITRE** : `# Task 8.2.{Z} -- {Nom de la tache}`
2. **METADONNEES** : phase + sprint + priorite + effort + dependances + decisions referenecees (decisions 022+030+031 obligatoires + autres relevantes) + livrables principaux + criteres validation references V-30
3. **BUT** : 2-3 paragraphes denses expliquant ce que la tache realise + impact strategique
4. **CONTEXTE** : 3-5 paragraphes + **minimum 8 pieges techniques** identifies avec solutions
5. **OBJECTIF** : liste 12+ items concrets a livrer
6. **ETAT REPO** : fichiers existants pertinents + fichiers a creer + fichiers a modifier
7. **REFERENCES** : Sprint 22/29 docs + Sprint 13 docs + Sprint 24 docs + decision-031 + autres relevantes
8. **IMPLEMENTATION** : 50-70% du fichier en code TypeScript NestJS + tests + migrations + UI Next.js, code complet executable
9. **TESTS** : minimum 12 unit + 5 integration + 3 E2E avec assertions explicites
10. **CRITERES DE VALIDATION** : referenecees V-30 criteres T0X-VY specifiques
11. **COMMANDES + NOTES** : commands d'execution + edge cases + pitfalls

## TASKS A GENERER -- SCOPES DETAILLES

### Task 8.2.1 -- Architecture + Decision-031 + Design Doc

**110-150 KB | P0 | 5h** | Dependances : Sprint 29 closure complete

**Scope** :
- Decision-031 ratifiee `decisions/031-garage-internal-operations-foundation.md` 8-12 pages :
  - Date : 15 juin 2026
  - Contexte : garage operations fragmentation tools tiers (Excel + WhatsApp + paper)
  - Decision : garage internal operations foundation comprehensive (6 entites + 6 services + Sprint 22/29 integration)
  - Alternatives evaluees : status quo (insufficient), outsourcing ERP externe (cost + complexity), minimal viable (insufficient foundation Sprint 31+), foundation comprehensive (choisi)
  - Consequences : developpement effort + maintenance + complexite UX
  - Roadmap Phase 8+ : EDI suppliers + barcodes scanning + predictive ML + mechanic mobile app + POS integration + multi-location transfers
- Design doc `docs/architecture/garage-internal-design.md` 20+ pages (1000+ lignes minimum) :
  - 6 entites detaillees avec JSONB schemas Zod
  - Diagrammes Mermaid event flows (Sprint 22 + Sprint 29)
  - State machine work orders documente
  - Low-stock alert flow + workload alert flow
  - Materials cost flow vers invoices
- Peer-review minutes
- Kickoff Phase 7 Sprint 2

**Livrables** : 2 documents + peer-review notes + kickoff minutes

**Pieges 8** :
1. Commercial vs technical scope creep (foundation only Sprint 30, advanced Phase 8+)
2. EDI suppliers complexity (defer Phase 8+ documented)
3. Predictive ML training data (defer Sprint 33 AI optimization)
4. Mechanic mobile app native (defer Phase 8+)
5. POS integration physical store (defer Phase 8+)
6. Multi-location transfers (defer Phase 8+)
7. Barcodes scanning (defer Phase 8+)
8. Automated reorder vendor APIs (defer Phase 8+)

### Task 8.2.2 -- Entites Garage Internal (6 tables)

**140-180 KB | P0 CRITIQUE | 7h** | Dependances : 8.2.1

**Scope** :
- Package `@insurtech/garage-internal` v1.0.0 NestJS module + package.json + tsconfig + folders structure
- 6 migrations TypeORM/Knex avec :
  - `inventory_items` (15 colonnes + version optimistic locking + RLS + indexes + UNIQUE (garage_id, sku))
  - `inventory_movements` (12 colonnes + append-only + indexes + linked_* mutually exclusive)
  - `work_orders` (12 colonnes + tasks JSONB + materials_used JSONB + state machine enum + indexes)
  - `mechanics` (11 colonnes + specialties GIN array + UNIQUE (garage_id, phone))
  - `suppliers` (10 colonnes + UNIQUE (garage_id, name))
  - `purchase_orders` (10 colonnes + items JSONB + status enum + indexes)
- RLS strict garage_id sur toutes 6 tables (CREATE POLICY + ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY)
- Enums TypeScript stricts (InventoryCategory + InventoryMovementType + WorkOrderLinkedTo + WorkOrderStatus + MechanicSpecialty + PurchaseOrderStatus)
- JSONB schemas Zod (tasks + materials_used + items PO)
- Seeds 3 garages demos exhaustifs (20+ items + 3 mechanics + 2 suppliers + 5 PO + 10 work orders)
- 16+ tests (validation + RLS positive/negative + UNIQUE 409 + optimistic locking conflicts + indexes EXPLAIN ANALYZE + JSONB schemas Zod)

**Pieges 10** :
1. RLS propagation Sprint 6 (verifier policies CREATE + ENABLE + tests negative)
2. UNIQUE constraints (garage_id, sku) violations 409 Conflict
3. Optimistic locking version column UPDATE WHERE version=X + retry on conflict
4. Soft-delete via active=false (no hard delete preserve history)
5. JSONB schemas Zod validation tasks + materials_used + items
6. State machine enum strict + tests transitions valides + negative invalid
7. Indexes performance (GIN pour arrays + partial pour active + composite pour queries frequent)
8. Snapshot cost_at_use + sale_price_at_use AT TIME (price changes don't retroactively affect)
9. Cross-vertical linked_* mutually exclusive (NULL ou un seul renseigne)
10. Movements append-only audit (no DELETE/UPDATE post-creation)

### Task 8.2.3 -- InventoryService

**130-170 KB | P0 | 6h** | Dependances : 8.2.2

**Scope** :
- Service `InventoryService` complete avec optimistic locking + S3 photos + low-stock alerts + valuation
- Methods : createItem + updateItem + deleteItem + listItems + recordMovement + getStockLevel + getMovementsHistory + getValueTotal + checkLowStockAlerts
- 14+ tests dont stress concurrent 100 operations same item

**Pieges 10** :
1. Concurrent inventory updates race conditions (optimistic locking + retry 3x)
2. Stock_out validation stock >= quantity (verify avant decrement)
3. Movement append-only audit
4. Adjustment movements reason_text mandatory
5. Low-stock cron daily dedup 24h Redis SET EX
6. Photos S3 Sprint 10 encryption + access logged
7. Valuation precision NUMERIC(10,2) MAD currency
8. Cross-tenant RLS strict
9. Soft-delete preserve history
10. Permissions garage_owner OR garage_manager

### Task 8.2.4 -- WorkOrderService CRITIQUE

**150-200 KB | P0 CRITIQUE | 8h** | Dependances : 8.2.3

**Scope** :
- Service `WorkOrderService` complete avec state machine + materials usage triggers
- 2 event handlers Sprint 22/29 dans `src/handlers/`
- Methods : createWorkOrder + assignMechanic + updateTasks + addMaterialUsage + completeWorkOrder + blockWorkOrder + cancelWorkOrder
- State machine 5 statuts (open/in_progress/blocked/completed/cancelled) enforced via service methods
- 16+ tests (creation + assign + materials + complete + block + cancel + Sprint 22 handler + Sprint 29 handler + state machine invalid + idempotency)

**Pieges 10** :
1. State machine invalid transitions rejected via service methods enforce (no direct status updates)
2. Materials_used updates trigger InventoryService.recordMovement automatic
3. Sprint 22 event handler idempotency-key sinistre_id+timestamp Redis
4. Sprint 29 event handler idempotency + auto-assign least loaded mechanic
5. Snapshot cost_at_use + sale_price_at_use AT TIME of consumption
6. Cancel reverse all materials_used via stock_in movements
7. Completion validation all tasks completed + trigger MaterialsBillingService.flowToInvoice
8. Tasks JSONB array operations safe (add/remove/complete/reorder)
9. Assignment workload check (warn if overloaded but allow)
10. Audit comprehensive Sprint 7 + events emit Sprint 14 Avro

```bash

# Lister tous fichiers

# Decision-031 obligatoire toutes tasks
for task in task-8.2.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-031" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-031"
  fi
done

# Decisions integration obligatoires
grep -qE "decision-022|Sprint 22|sinistre.*work_submitted" task-8.2.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.4 MISSING Sprint 22 integration"
grep -qE "decision-030|Sprint 29|direct_booking.*confirmed" task-8.2.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.4 MISSING Sprint 29 integration"

# Pieges >= 8 minimum

  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges (minimum 8)"
  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "optimistic.*locking|version.*column" task-8.2.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.3 MISSING optimistic locking"
grep -qE "state machine|invalid.*transition" task-8.2.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.4 MISSING state machine"
grep -qE "MECHANIC_WORKLOAD_ALERT_THRESHOLD_FACTOR" task-8.2.5*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.5 MISSING workload threshold"
grep -qE "PURCHASE_ORDER_FOUNDATION_ONLY=true|EDI.*Phase 8" task-8.2.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.6 MISSING foundation only"
grep -qE "MATERIALS_BILLING_DEFAULT_MARKUP_PERCENT=20|markup.*20" task-8.2.7*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.7 MISSING markup 20%"
grep -qE "INVENTORY_LOW_STOCK_CRON=0 3|MECHANIC_WORKLOAD_CRON=0 2" task-8.2.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.8 MISSING cron schedules"
grep -qE "PHASE 7 SPRINT 2.*COMPLETE|Sprint 31 prereqs|GO Sprint 31" task-8.2.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.2.12 MISSING closure narrative"
```

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections par task

Chaque fichier task-8.3.{Z}-prompt.md doit avoir :

1. **TITRE** : `# Task 8.3.{Z} -- {Nom de la tache}`
2. **METADONNEES** : phase + sprint + priorite + effort + dependances + decisions referenecees (decisions 022+030+031+032 obligatoires + 009 + 025 si relevant) + livrables principaux + criteres validation references V-31

6. **ETAT REPO** : fichiers existants + a creer + a modifier
7. **REFERENCES** : Sprint 22/29/30/13/24/9/10 docs + decision-032 + autres relevantes
8. **IMPLEMENTATION** : 50-70% du fichier en code TypeScript NestJS + tests + migrations + UI Next.js
9. **TESTS** : minimum 12 unit + 5 integration + 3 E2E
10. **CRITERES VALIDATION** : referenecees V-31 criteres T0X-VY specifiques
11. **COMMANDES + NOTES** : commands d'execution + edge cases + pitfalls

### Task 8.3.1 -- Architecture + Decision-032 + Design Doc

- Design doc `docs/architecture/garage-accounting-marketing-design.md` 20+ pages avec entites detaillees + JSONB schemas Zod + diagrammes Mermaid event flows (Sprint 22 + 29 invoicing + Sprint 30 compensation) + tax compliance MA flow + campaigns flow CNDP compliant + mechanic compensation cron flow
- Peer-review minutes
- Kickoff Phase 7 Sprint 3

1. Commercial vs technical scope creep (foundation only)
2. DGI integration complexity (defer Phase 8+)
3. Payroll legal CNSS/IGR Morocco (defer Phase 8+)
4. ERPs externes integration (defer Phase 8+)
5. Multi-currency EUR/USD (defer Phase 8+)

### Task 8.3.2 -- Entites Garage Accounting Marketing (5 tables)

**130-170 KB | P0 CRITIQUE | 6h** | Dependances : 8.3.1

**Scope** :
- Package `@insurtech/garage-accounting-marketing` v1.0.0 NestJS module
- 5 migrations TypeORM/Knex avec entites detaillees (cf B-31)
- RLS strict garage_id sur toutes 5 tables
- Enums TypeScript stricts
- JSONB schemas Zod (line_items + applicable_services + message_template)
- Seeds 3 garages demos exhaustifs (tax configs + invoices + promotions + campaigns + compensations)
- 14+ tests unitaires

**Pieges 10** :
1. RLS propagation Sprint 6 (verifier policies CREATE + ENABLE + tests negative)
2. UNIQUE (garage_id, invoice_number) violations 409
3. UNIQUE tax_config single per garage 409
4. UNIQUE (garage_id, code) promotions WHERE code IS NOT NULL
5. UNIQUE (mechanic_id, period_month) compensations 409
6. NUMERIC(10,2) precision Decimal montants MAD
7. JSONB schemas Zod validation strict
8. Indexes performance (status partial + period queries + linked_to+linked_id)
9. State machine enums stricts
10. audit_trail JSONB append-only

### Task 8.3.3 -- InvoicingService Sprint 22+29 Integration CRITIQUE

**140-180 KB | P0 CRITIQUE | 7h** | Dependances : 8.3.2

**Scope** :
- Service `InvoicingService` complete (cf B-31 + C-31)
- Sequential numbering atomic Redis SETNX per (garage_id, year)
- Format `GAR-{garage_short_5}-{year}-{seq:6}` zero-padded
- PDF generation Sprint 10 Puppeteer + template HTML + branding optional Sprint 27
- 2 event handlers Sprint 22 + Sprint 29 dans `src/handlers/`
- 16+ tests scenarios (creation manual + auto Sprint 22 + auto Sprint 29 + issue numbering atomic + PDF + mark paid + cancel + concurrent stress)

**Pieges 10** :
1. Invoice numbering concurrent generation lock atomic Redis SETNX strict (no duplicates)
2. Format invoice_number string padding zero leading
3. Garage short generation safe chars only
4. PDF Puppeteer performance large
5. PDF template HTML + branding Sprint 27 + tax_id_legal mandatory
6. Sprint 22 event handler idempotency-key sinistre_id+timestamp Redis
7. Sprint 29 event handler idempotency booking_id+timestamp
8. Materials cost Sprint 30 MaterialsBillingService integration
9. State machine transitions (draft -> issued -> paid OR cancelled)
10. Audit Sprint 7 + events emit Sprint 14 Avro

- Exemptions documented categories specifiques

### Task 8.3.6 -- PromotionService Sprint 29 Integration

**130-170 KB | P0 | 6h** | Dependances : 8.3.5

- CRUD + validateAndApply atomic transaction
- applyAutomaticEligible no-code best discount
- Integration Sprint 29 BookingService.applyPromotion handler
- max_uses enforce atomic UPDATE WHERE uses_count < max_uses RETURNING
- 14+ tests scenarios

8. Audit + emit events
9. Soft-delete preserve history

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION DES 12 FICHIERS

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-31-garage-accounting-marketing/

# Lister tous fichiers
ls -la task-8.3.*.md

# Verifier tailles
wc -c task-8.3.*.md

# No emoji absolu
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-8.3.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-032 obligatoire toutes tasks
for task in task-8.3.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-032" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-032"
  fi
done

# Decisions integration obligatoires
grep -qE "decision-022|Sprint 22|sinistre.*work_submitted_completed" task-8.3.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.3 MISSING Sprint 22 integration"
grep -qE "decision-030|Sprint 29|direct_booking.*completed" task-8.3.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.3 MISSING Sprint 29 integration"
grep -qE "decision-031|Sprint 30|work_orders.*completed|materials_cost" task-8.3.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.8 MISSING Sprint 30 integration"
grep -qE "decision-009|Sprint 9|Brevo|Twilio" task-8.3.7*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.7 MISSING Sprint 9 providers"

# Pieges >= 8 minimum
for task in task-8.3.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges (minimum 8)"
  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "SETNX|atomic.*invoice.*numbering" task-8.3.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.3 MISSING atomic numbering"
grep -qE "TAX_TVA_RATE_DEFAULT_PERCENT=20|Decimal\.js" task-8.3.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.4 MISSING TVA Decimal"
grep -qE "max_uses.*atomic|uses_count.*atomic" task-8.3.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.6 MISSING atomic max_uses"
grep -qE "CNDP|opt.out.*mandatory|suppress.*list" task-8.3.7*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.7 MISSING CNDP compliance"
grep -qE "MECHANIC_COMPENSATION_CRON=0 1 1|monthly.*cron|first day" task-8.3.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.8 MISSING cron schedule"
grep -qE "garage business operations complete|Sprint 32|GO Sprint 32" task-8.3.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.3.12 MISSING closure narrative"
```

**110-150 KB | P0 | 5h** | Dependances : Sprint 31 closure complete

  - Decision : loyalty programs + online presence advanced foundation comprehensive
  - Architecture : 8 entites + 6 services + 2 handlers + 1 worker + Sprint 18+24 extensions

  - Consequences : developpement + complexite UX customer + maintenance loyalty + marketing rules
  - Roadmap Phase 8+ : multi-garage points + partner rewards (Carrefour + restaurants) + gamification (badges + leaderboards) + mobile native app + AI loyalty Sprint 33 + advanced rules engine

  - Diagrammes Mermaid flows (Sprint 29 direct_booking.completed -> earn points -> tier recompute + referral check + redemption flow + expiry FIFO + content marketing publishing flow + SEO sitemap generation pattern)
- Peer-review minutes
- Kickoff Phase 7 Sprint 4

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION DES 12 FICHIERS

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-32-garage-online-loyalty/

# Lister + tailles
ls -la task-8.4.*.md
wc -c task-8.4.*.md

# No emoji
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-8.4.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-033 obligatoire
for task in task-8.4.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-033" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-033"
  fi
done

# Decisions integration
grep -qE "decision-030|Sprint 29|direct_booking.completed" task-8.4.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.4 MISSING Sprint 29"
grep -qE "decision-030|Sprint 29|direct_booking.completed" task-8.4.5*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.5 MISSING Sprint 29"
grep -qE "decision-032|Sprint 31|CampaignService.*vip" task-8.4.4*.md || echo "ATTENTION : task-8.4.4 verify Sprint 31 segmentation note"
grep -qE "BlogPosting|@type.*BlogPosting" task-8.4.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.6 MISSING Schema.org BlogPosting"
grep -qE "Review.*@type|Schema.org.*Review" task-8.4.7*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.7 MISSING Schema.org Review"
grep -qE "sitemap.*dynamic|generateSitemap|jsonld-validator" task-8.4.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.8 MISSING Schema.org/sitemap"
grep -qE "Sprint 24|garage-portal" task-8.4.9*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.9 MISSING Sprint 24"
grep -qE "Sprint 18|customer-portal" task-8.4.10*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.10 MISSING Sprint 18"
grep -qE "Sprint 32 closure|customer retention|GO Sprint 33" task-8.4.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.12 MISSING closure"

# Pieges >= 8
for task in task-8.4.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges"
  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "optimistic.*locking|version.*column|atomic.*balance" task-8.4.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.4 MISSING atomic balance"
grep -qE "FIFO|oldest.*first|occurred_at ASC" task-8.4.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.4 MISSING FIFO expiry"
grep -qE "crypto\.randomBytes|REFERRAL_CODE_LENGTH=8|retry.*5" task-8.4.5*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.5 MISSING UNIQUE code"
grep -qE "BLOG_POST_MIN_WORD_COUNT=300|featured_image_required" task-8.4.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.6 MISSING content guidelines"
grep -qE "SITEMAP_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS=86400|cache.*24h" task-8.4.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-8.4.8 MISSING cache 24h"
```

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections par task

Chaque fichier task-8.5.{Z}-prompt.md doit avoir :

1. **TITRE** : `# Task 8.5.{Z} -- {Nom de la tache}`
2. **METADONNEES** : phase + sprint + priorite + effort + dependances + decisions referenecees (decisions 013 + 030 + 031 + 032 + 033 + 034 obligatoires) + livrables principaux + criteres validation V-33
3. **BUT** : 2-3 paragraphes denses expliquant impact strategique CLOTURE Phase 7 + AI value proposition
4. **CONTEXTE** : 3-5 paragraphes + **minimum 8 pieges techniques** avec solutions
5. **OBJECTIF** : liste 12+ items concrets a livrer
6. **ETAT REPO** : fichiers existants + a creer + a modifier
7. **REFERENCES** : Sprint 13 docs + Sprint 29 docs + Sprint 30 docs + Sprint 32 docs + decision-034 + algorithms Phase 8+ roadmap
8. **IMPLEMENTATION** : 50-70% du fichier en code TypeScript NestJS + algorithms TypeScript-native + tests + UI Next.js
9. **TESTS** : minimum 14 unit + 5 integration + 3 E2E avec assertions explicites
10. **CRITERES VALIDATION** : referenecees V-33 criteres T0X-VY specifiques
11. **COMMANDES + NOTES** : commands d'execution + edge cases + pitfalls

### Task 8.5.3 -- AIPredictiveMaintenanceService Sprint 30 Integration

**130-170 KB | P0 | 6h** | Dependances : 8.5.2 parallel 8.5.4

**Scope** :
- Service `AIPredictiveMaintenanceService` complete (cf B-33 + C-33)
- Algorithm dans `src/algorithms/predictive-maintenance-formula.ts` :
  - Group bookings by service_category per customer per vehicle
  - Compute average interval days + standard deviation
  - Consistency score = 1 - normalize(stdDev / avgInterval)
  - Predicted date = last_completed + avg_interval_days
  - Confidence threshold AI_PREDICTIVE_MAINTENANCE_CONFIDENCE_MIN=0.7
- Worker `ai-predictive-maintenance-cron.worker.ts` BullMQ Repeatable weekly Monday 06h00 MA
- Sprint 30 work_orders + Sprint 29 direct_bookings query training data
- Sprint 9 notify customer 7 days before predicted_date (opt-in only)
- 14+ tests

**Pieges 8** :
1. Algorithm accuracy edge cases (1 booking history = no prediction)
2. Confidence threshold avoid false positives
3. Customer opt-in required (privacy)
4. Sprint 9 notification timing (7 days too late if service overdue)
5. Vehicle_identifier matching (license plate + VIN)
6. Service_category grouping (similar categories merged)
7. Performance large customer base (Sprint 13 MV)
8. Sprint 30 + Sprint 29 union query optimization

## 26. G-34-sprint-34-task-generator.md

```md
# G-34 -- META-PROMPT GENERATEUR DE TASKS -- SPRINT 34

> ## CORRECTION v3.1 (2026-06-02) -- PRIORITAIRE SUR LE RESTE DU FICHIER
>
> Ce fichier a ete genere avant le pivot v3.1 (ecosysteme 7 acteurs, decision-012-ecosysteme-7-acteurs). En cas de divergence, ces regles PRIMENT sur toute mention residuelle plus bas (qui parle encore de 6 acteurs, 26 roles, 7 types cross-tenant, 130 permissions, PartsHub, ou d'un e-constat genere/signe par Assurflow) :
>
> - Ecosysteme a 7 acteurs : Broker, Garage, Carrier, Expert, Customer/Assure, Tow, et CONSTATEUR (NOUVEAU v3.1).
> - Tenancy 3 niveaux : N1 tenants dedies (Garage, Broker, Carrier, Expert) ; N2 rattache (Customer/Assure) ; N3 sans tenant, acteur reseau leger style Uber-driver (Tow, Constateur).
> - RBAC (recompute depuis la base v3.0) : 26 - 1 (garage_parts_manager retire, PartsHub abandonne) + 3 (constateur_admin, constateur_dispatcher, constateur_agent) = 28 roles.
> - Cross-tenant (recompute) : 7 + 1 (claim_to_constateur_dispatch) = 8 types. La ressource parts_order est remplacee par constat (total ressources inchange).
> - Permissions (recompute) : 130 - 7 (module parts retire) + 8 (module constateur ajoute) = 131.
> - PartsHub (decision-014) est ABANDONNE : il ne doit plus apparaitre comme fonctionnalite active.
> - e-constat : Assurflow ne cree, ne remplit ni ne signe JAMAIS le constat. Le constat est gere par l'application TIERCE e-constat de l'ecosysteme AFMA (saisie, signatures conformes loi 43-20, emission d'un numero officiel) ; Assurflow recupere les donnees du constat via API a partir de ce numero.

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 8 -- Integration Stubs (Sprint 1)
**Sprint** : 34 / 37
**Tasks** : 9.1.1 a 9.1.12 (12 fichiers, 100-350 KB chacun)
**Reference** : `B-34`, `C-34`, `V-34`
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections par task

Chaque fichier task-9.1.{Z}-prompt.md doit avoir :

1. **TITRE** : `# Task 9.1.{Z} -- {Nom de la tache}`
2. **METADONNEES** : phase + sprint + priorite + effort + dependances + decisions referenecees (decisions 006 + 009 + 010 + 013 + 014 + 015 + 027 + 028 + 035 obligatoires) + livrables principaux + criteres validation V-34

4. **CONTEXTE** : 3-5 paragraphes + **minimum 8 pieges techniques** avec solutions
5. **OBJECTIF** : liste 12+ items concrets a livrer
6. **ETAT REPO** : fichiers existants + a creer + a modifier
7. **REFERENCES** : Sprint 9/10/13/14/15/27/28 docs + decision-035 + decision-027 fictional brands + circuit breaker patterns
8. **IMPLEMENTATION** : 50-70% du fichier en code TypeScript NestJS + stubs implementations + workers BullMQ + tests + Next.js admin-portal
9. **TESTS** : minimum 14 unit + 5 integration + 3 E2E avec assertions explicites
10. **CRITERES VALIDATION** : referenecees V-34 criteres T0X-VY specifiques
11. **COMMANDES + NOTES** : commands d'execution + edge cases + pitfalls

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION DES 12 FICHIERS

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-34-integration-stubs-insurers/

ls -la task-9.1.*.md
wc -c task-9.1.*.md

# No emoji
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-9.1.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-035 obligatoire
for task in task-9.1.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-035" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-035"
  fi
done

# Decision-027 fictional brands strict
grep -qE "decision-027|fictional.*credible|AssurMaghreb|Atlas Insurance|MediAssur" task-9.1.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.4 MISSING fictional brands"

# Real brand names check (must NOT contain)
for task in task-9.1.*.md; do
  if grep -qE "Wafa Assurance|RMA|AXA Maroc|Saham" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task CONTAINS REAL BRAND NAMES (forbidden)"
  fi
done

# Decisions integration
grep -qE "decision-010|Sprint 10|credentials_encrypted|encrypt" task-9.1.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.3 MISSING Sprint 10 encryption"
grep -qE "decision-009|Sprint 9|NotificationService" task-9.1.7*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.7 MISSING Sprint 9 refactor"
grep -qE "decision-014|Sprint 14|events Avro" task-9.1.4*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.4 MISSING Sprint 14 events"
grep -qE "decision-013|Sprint 13|connector_observability_mv" task-9.1.11*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.11 MISSING Sprint 13 MV"
grep -qE "decision-028|Sprint 28|admin-portal" task-9.1.9*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.9 MISSING Sprint 28"

# Pieges >= 8
for task in task-9.1.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges"
  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "circuit_breaker_state|closed|open|half-open" task-9.1.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.3 MISSING circuit breaker"
grep -qE "HMAC|sha256|computeHMAC" task-9.1.10*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.10 MISSING HMAC verification"
grep -qE "exponential.*backoff|Math\.pow|jitter" task-9.1.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.8 MISSING backoff"
grep -qE "INTEGRATION_CONNECTORS_MODE|production.*swap|Phase 9" task-9.1.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.1.12 MISSING Phase 9 ready"
```

## 27. G-35-sprint-35-task-generator.md

```md
# G-35 -- META-PROMPT GENERATEUR DE TASKS -- SPRINT 35

> ## CORRECTION v3.1 (2026-06-02) -- PRIORITAIRE SUR LE RESTE DU FICHIER
>
> Ce fichier a ete genere avant le pivot v3.1 (ecosysteme 7 acteurs, decision-012-ecosysteme-7-acteurs). En cas de divergence, ces regles PRIMENT sur toute mention residuelle plus bas (qui parle encore de 6 acteurs, 26 roles, 7 types cross-tenant, 130 permissions, PartsHub, ou d'un e-constat genere/signe par Assurflow) :
>
> - Ecosysteme a 7 acteurs : Broker, Garage, Carrier, Expert, Customer/Assure, Tow, et CONSTATEUR (NOUVEAU v3.1).
> - Tenancy 3 niveaux : N1 tenants dedies (Garage, Broker, Carrier, Expert) ; N2 rattache (Customer/Assure) ; N3 sans tenant, acteur reseau leger style Uber-driver (Tow, Constateur).
> - RBAC (recompute depuis la base v3.0) : 26 - 1 (garage_parts_manager retire, PartsHub abandonne) + 3 (constateur_admin, constateur_dispatcher, constateur_agent) = 28 roles.
> - Cross-tenant (recompute) : 7 + 1 (claim_to_constateur_dispatch) = 8 types. La ressource parts_order est remplacee par constat (total ressources inchange).
> - Permissions (recompute) : 130 - 7 (module parts retire) + 8 (module constateur ajoute) = 131.
> - PartsHub (decision-014) est ABANDONNE : il ne doit plus apparaitre comme fonctionnalite active.
> - e-constat : Assurflow ne cree, ne remplit ni ne signe JAMAIS le constat. Le constat est gere par l'application TIERCE e-constat de l'ecosysteme AFMA (saisie, signatures conformes loi 43-20, emission d'un numero officiel) ; Assurflow recupere les donnees du constat via API a partir de ce numero.

**Version** : v3.0
**Phase** : 8 -- Integration Stubs + Security (Sprint 2 -- DERNIER PHASE 8)
**Sprint** : 35 / 37
**Tasks** : 9.2.1 a 9.2.12 (12 fichiers, 110-350 KB chacun)
**Reference** : `B-35`, `C-35`, `V-35`
**AUCUNE EMOJI** (decision-006 absolu)

---

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections par task

Chaque fichier task-9.2.{Z}-prompt.md doit avoir :

1. **TITRE** : `# Task 9.2.{Z} -- {Nom de la tache}`
2. **METADONNEES** : phase + sprint + priorite + effort + dependances + decisions referenecees (decisions 008 + 009 + 010 + 013 + 014 + 027 + 028 + 035 + 036 obligatoires) + livrables principaux + criteres validation V-35
3. **BUT** : 2-3 paragraphes denses expliquant impact strategique production readiness + compliance + Demo Day enterprise credibility
4. **CONTEXTE** : 3-5 paragraphes + **minimum 8 pieges techniques** avec solutions
5. **OBJECTIF** : liste 12+ items concrets a livrer
6. **ETAT REPO** : fichiers existants + a creer + a modifier
7. **REFERENCES** : OWASP docs + Vault docs + Snyk/Trivy docs + CNDP/ACAPS docs + Sprint 9/10/13/27/28/34 docs + decisions referenecees
8. **IMPLEMENTATION** : 50-70% du fichier en code TypeScript NestJS + integrations + workers + middlewares + tests + runbooks + compliance docs
9. **TESTS** : minimum 14 unit + 5 integration + 3 E2E avec assertions explicites
10. **CRITERES VALIDATION** : referenecees V-35 criteres T0X-VY specifiques
11. **COMMANDES + NOTES** : commands d'execution + edge cases + pitfalls

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION DES 12 FICHIERS

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-35-pentest-security-hardening/

ls -la task-9.2.*.md
wc -c task-9.2.*.md

# No emoji
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-9.2.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-036 obligatoire
for task in task-9.2.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-036" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-036"
  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "OWASP Top 10 2021|ASVS Level 2|CVSS" task-9.2.11*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.2.11 MISSING OWASP/ASVS/CVSS"
grep -qE "zero-downtime|Vault|HashiCorp" task-9.2.5*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.2.5 MISSING Vault/zero-downtime"
grep -qE "CSP|HSTS|X-Frame-Options" task-9.2.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.2.6 MISSING security headers"

grep -qE "CNDP|ACAPS|PCI-DSS|GDPR" task-9.2.9*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.2.9 MISSING compliance frameworks"
grep -qE "Snyk|Trivy|Gitleaks|OWASP Dependency-Check" task-9.2.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.2.3 MISSING scanners integration"
grep -qE "PHASE 8 CLOTURE|Sprint 36|GO Phase 9" task-9.2.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.2.12 MISSING Phase 8 cloture"

# Pieges >= 8
for task in task-9.2.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges"
  fi
done

## CONTRAINTES UNIVERSELLES TOUS LES 12 TASKS

### Format strict

Headers ATX, code blocks bash/typescript/markdown/yaml, tableaux, Mermaid diagrams.

### Style narratif dense

Prose privilegiee, paragraphes 6-12 lignes justifies, niveau technique senior production + Demo Day execution + commercial launch + PROGRAMME CLOTURE + vision strategique founder.

### References strategiques obligatoires

Chaque task minimum 5 decisions, **decision-038 obligatoire toutes tasks FINAL**.

## WORKFLOW D'EXECUTION RECOMMANDE PAR TASK

```
1. Lire B-37 section "Tache 9.4.{Z}"
2. Lire V-37 criteres V{N} specifiques
3. Lire C-37 etapes detaillees
4. Lire tasks Sprint 36 voisines
5. Lire decisions/001-038 -- decision-038 OBLIGATOIRE FINAL
6. Lire decisions 027 + 035 + 036 + 037 si task related
7. Lire templates/03-template-task.md
8. Rediger task-9.4.{Z}-{slug}.md
9. Verifier taille Min-Max KB
10. Verifier no emoji absolu
11. Verifier pieges >= 8 minimum
12. Verifier code TypeScript executable
13. Verifier Demo Day materials production-grade
14. Commit Conventional Commits
```

- 9.4.1 peer-reviewed + decision-038 ratifiee FINAL

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION DES 12 FICHIERS

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-37-go-live-demo-day/

ls -la task-9.4.*.md
wc -c task-9.4.*.md

# No emoji
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-9.4.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-038 obligatoire
for task in task-9.4.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-038" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-038"
  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "Sprint 36|DeploymentService|canary" task-9.4.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.4.3 MISSING Sprint 36"
grep -qE "10.*slides|5.*live.*demos|Q&A.*50" task-9.4.5*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.4.5 MISSING Demo Day materials"
grep -qE "5\+.*rehearsals|dry.runs|J-[1-9]" task-9.4.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.4.6 MISSING dry runs"
grep -qE "Basic.*Premium.*Enterprise|10.*garages|skalean\.com" task-9.4.8*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.4.8 MISSING commercial launch"
grep -qE "Marrakech|30.*juin 2026|Demo Day" task-9.4.11*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.4.11 MISSING Demo Day execution"
grep -qE "PROGRAMME GLOBAL CLOTURE|37 sprints|38 decisions|9 phases" task-9.4.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.4.12 MISSING PROGRAMME CLOTURE"
grep -qE "Phase 10\+|multi-vertical|cross-country|Anthropic AI|horizontal platform" task-9.4.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-9.4.12 MISSING Phase 10+ roadmap"

# Pieges >= 8
for task in task-9.4.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges"
  fi
done
```

## STRUCTURE OBLIGATOIRE -- 11 sections par task

Chaque fichier task-10.1.{Z}-prompt.md doit avoir :

1. **TITRE** : `# Task 10.1.{Z} -- {Nom de la tache}`
2. **METADONNEES** : phase + sprint + priorite + effort + dependances + decisions referenecees (decisions 001 + 006 + 008 + 009 + 010 + 011 + 013 + 014 + 015 + 027 + 028 + 035 + 036 + 039 obligatoires) + livrables principaux + criteres validation V-40
3. **BUT** : 2-3 paragraphes denses expliquant impact strategique Phase 10 ouverture commercial vertical premier
4. **CONTEXTE** : 3-5 paragraphes + **minimum 8 pieges techniques** avec solutions
5. **OBJECTIF** : liste 12+ items concrets a livrer
6. **ETAT REPO** : fichiers existants + a creer + a modifier
7. **REFERENCES** : insurance domain docs + Sprint 5/6/7/9/10/11/13/14/15/27/28/34/35 docs + decisions
8. **IMPLEMENTATION** : 50-70% du fichier en code TypeScript NestJS + state machine + saga patterns + integrations + tests
9. **TESTS** : minimum 14 unit + 5 integration + 3 E2E avec assertions explicites
10. **CRITERES VALIDATION** : referenecees V-40 criteres T0X-VY specifiques
11. **COMMANDES + NOTES** : commands d'execution + edge cases + pitfalls

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-40-insurance-broker-foundation/

ls -la task-10.1.*.md
wc -c task-10.1.*.md

# No emoji
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-10.1.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-039 obligatoire

  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "RLS|tenant_id|multi-tenant" task-10.1.2*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.1.2 MISSING RLS"
grep -qE "12 etats|state machine|policy-state-machine" task-10.1.2*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.1.2 MISSING state machine"
grep -qE "saga|compensation|Sprint 10|Sprint 11|Sprint 34" task-10.1.5*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.1.5 MISSING saga + integrations"
grep -qE "AssurMaghreb|Sprint 34.*activation|circuit breaker" task-10.1.9*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.1.9 MISSING AssurMaghreb"
grep -qE "ACAPS|acaps_reference|Sprint 35.*compliance" task-10.1.10*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.1.10 MISSING ACAPS"
grep -qE "policies|quotes|subscriptions|premiums" task-10.1.11*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.1.11 MISSING 4 tabs"

# Decision-027 fictional brands strict
for task in task-10.1.2*.md task-10.1.9*.md; do
  grep -qE "AssurMaghreb|Atlas Insurance|MediAssur|Maghreb Mutuelle|Royale Assurance|Continental Insurance" "$task" || echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING fictional brands decision-027"
done

# Pieges >= 8
for task in task-10.1.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 8 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges"
  fi
done
```

```

## VERIFICATION FINALE APRES GENERATION

```bash
cd 00-pilotage/prompts-taches/sprint-50-insurance-embedded-cross-sell/

ls -la task-10.11.*.md
wc -c task-10.11.*.md

# No emoji
grep -P "[\x{1F300}-\x{1F9FF}]|[\x{2600}-\x{27BF}]" task-10.11.*.md && echo "EMOJI FAIL" || echo "No emoji OK"

# Decision-049 obligatoire
for task in task-10.11.*.md; do
  if ! grep -q "decision-049" "$task"; then
    echo "ERREUR : $task MISSING decision-049"
  fi
done

# Specifics critiques
grep -qE "Sprint 42|InsuranceChurnPredictionService|Sprint 49|DriverBehaviorScoringService" task-10.11.3*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.11.3 MISSING Sprint 42/49 fusion"
grep -qE "Sprint 46|NurtureCampaignService" task-10.11.5*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.11.5 MISSING Sprint 46"
grep -qE "Sprint 18|customer-portal|Sprint 40|PolicyService" task-10.11.6*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.11.6 MISSING Sprint 18/40"
grep -qE "PROGRAMME CLOTURE|phase-10-closure-report|phase-11-roadmap" task-10.11.11*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.11.11 MISSING PROGRAMME CLOTURE"
grep -qE "PHASE 10 FINAL|11 sprints|48 sprints total" task-10.11.12*.md || echo "ERREUR : task-10.11.12 MISSING PHASE 10 FINAL"

# Pieges >= 6
for task in task-10.11.*.md; do
  COUNT=$(grep -cE "Piege [0-9]+ :" "$task")
  if [ "$COUNT" -lt 6 ]; then
    echo "ATTENTION : $task only $COUNT pieges (target 6+)"
  fi
done
```
